topic: A barista preparing a traditional Turkish coffee using a cezve in hot sand.

parsed_generation.script:
Shot 1 [00:00-00:02]: Barista lowers cezve into hot sand — front view
Shot 2 [00:02-00:05]: Cezve heats in sand as foam forms — close-up
Shot 3 [00:05-00:08]: Barista pours the brewed coffee from the cezve into a cup, steam rising — top-down
parsed_generation.narration: The barista places the cezve in hot sand, then the brew starts to foam as it heats. Finally, the barista pours the coffee into a cup, steam rising from the cup.

feedback: The sequence captures the core actions (cezve in hot sand, heating foam, pouring), but it could more closely mirror the gold standard by using two continuous time blocks with explicit sand-circling, foam rising to the brim, and a final pour into a small cup. Add richer descriptors of the cezve, sand, and foam, and align the timing to the 0:00–0:04 and 0:04–0:08 structure. Consider naming the foam thickness and the moment just before boil-over to elevate tension.
strengths: Clear shot progression with camera-angle notes
Concise, action-first narration aligned to visuals
fixes: Describe circular movement of the cezve through hot sand to reflect traditional method
Highlight foam rise to brim and a safe stop before boiling, followed by pouring into a cup; consolidate into two 4-second blocks for gold-standard timing
